reviews.comment:
Una señora atendiendo una estación, eran 4 autos delante mío, perdí literal! 2 horas en la cola de 4 autos! Bronca e indignación venir viajando y perder tanto tiempo, encima cuando llego a la estación para cargar combustible, la señora que estaba atendiendo desaparece por 20 minutos más!!

(Translated by Google)
A woman was working at a gas station; there were four cars ahead of me. I literally lost two hours in that line of four cars! I'm so angry and indignant to have traveled and wasted so much time. And then, when I finally got to the station to fill up, the woman who was working disappeared for another 20 minutes!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZbHBTMEtREAE
